0.text: Widespread fibrotic changes with reticulonodular density increases in the apices of both lungs

1.text: Pleural irregularity and microretraction in the apices of both lungs

2.text: Paraseptal emphysema in the apices of both lungs

3.text: Parenchymal nodule measuring 5.7 mm adjacent to the minor fissure in the medial segment of the right middle lobe

4.text: Parenchymal nodule measuring 3.2 mm in the anteromediobasal segment of the left lower lobe
